description: A refinery operator manages the hydrogen plant and distribution network to ensure a reliable supply for hydrotreating and hydrocracking units.

nodes.task_description: Check the current production rate and purity of the steam methane reformer (SMR) hydrogen plant.

expected_outcome.value: The operator confirms the plant is running stably and producing on-spec hydrogen.

nodes.task_description: Review the hydrogen consumption of the main user units and the pressure in the hydrogen supply header.

expected_outcome.value: The review shows that demand is increasing and header pressure is starting to drop.

nodes.task_description: Increase the production rate of the SMR to meet the higher demand and stabilize the header pressure.

expected_outcome.value: The SMR's production is ramped up, and the hydrogen network pressure returns to normal.
